description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and upload to PyPI that triggers on push to main and python branches. The workflow should have three jobs: build_wheels to build wheels for Python 3.6-3.10 on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest, build_sdist to build a source distribution on ubuntu-latest, and upload_pypi to upload the artifacts to PyPI using a TEST_PYPI_API_TOKEN from secrets.
